content:
A new challenge run stream series (that I might eventually make into the video) where I try to make ANY progress in the game while ONLY pulling my characters (not even standards!!!) from the Kaleido Recollections banners! <:W_falldown:1400771812542906389> Thanks if you watch!~

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YwUwJysVEcU

embeds.title: Morimens but I ONLY pull characters from the Kaleido Recollections ...
embeds.description:
A fresh account CHALLENGE RUN series where I am doomed to only pull off the completely random Kaleido banners!

- No Realm Study for characters
- No specific character banners
- No hope
